verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents selected Uganda) and terminated the process. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous agent consensus and the strong visual evidence (Sadolin branding, LHT, red soil) to confirm Uganda.
